commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://efa-validation-<AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>/manifests/stage4/model-prefetch.yaml /tmp/model-prefetch.yaml --region us-east-2'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete job model-prefetch clean-model-dir -n efa-validation --ignore-not-found --grace-period=0 --force 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete pod -n efa-validation -l job-name=clean-model-dir --grace-period=0 --force 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete pod -n efa-validation -l job-name=model-prefetch --grace-period=0 --force 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete deploy mooncake-metadata -n efa-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n efa-validation -o wide 2>&1 | grep prefetch'
